name: delegate-to-worker: a frontdesk delegation routes as an a2a message to the worker
description: The headline routing the misroute/nack feedback (ADR-0040) is about. With a worker wired as an agent destination, a <message to=worker> must become a channel_type='agent' outbound addressed to that worker's agent group — NOT a channel delivery back to the user.
agentResponse: <message to="finance-worker">approve invoice INV-1 for this employee</message>
